_about: Golden snapshot of the headline validation metrics. `make reproduce` re-runs the full validation suite offline against the committed real-data fixtures and asserts every number below regenerates within tolerance. The suite is deterministic (stdlib logistic fit, fixed seed, no network), so a clean checkout must reproduce these exactly. These are the same figures published in PROJECT_OVERVIEW.md section 5.

fire.source: USDA FPA-FOD + ERA5, Pacific NW 2012-2018, temporal split

fire-india.source: NASA FIRMS VIIRS + ERA5, India, train 2015-2021 / test 2022-2024
